use_cases: Allow users to connect social accounts like Discord, Slack, or Reddit to a platform
Display connection status feedback during OAuth or API authentication flows
Provide visual confirmation when external services are successfully linked
Enable community building by connecting users to branded social channels
Serve as part of onboarding flows for SaaS platforms requiring social integration
ai_summary: A set of glass-morphism styled social platform connection buttons for Discord, Slack, and Reddit with animated connection states. Features gradient backgrounds, glowing borders, and smooth hover/click transitions. Includes simulated connection logic with loading and success states. Designed for SaaS onboarding, community platforms, or any application requiring social service integration.
